message.content:
@startuml
title Capture Credit Card Payment

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Shop" as Shop
participant "PAYONE" as PAYONE

Client -> Shop: POST prepare.php
activate Shop
Shop --> Client: 302 capture.php
deactivate Shop

Client -> Shop: GET capture.php
activate Shop

alt [No Pseudo Card PAN present]
  Shop --> Client: 200 Credit Card Form
  Client -> Shop: POST Card PAN
  activate Shop
  Shop --> PAYONE: 200 Pseudo Card PAN
  deactivate Shop
  Shop --> Client: 200 Pseudo Card PAN
  Client -> Shop: POST capture.php
  activate Shop
  Shop --> PAYONE: POST request=authorization
  activate PAYONE
  alt [With 3-D Secure]
    Shop --> Client: 302 3-D Secure Form
    Client -> Shop: POST 3-D Secure Password
    activate Shop
    Shop --> PAYONE: POST notify.php txaction=appointed
    activate PAYONE
    Shop --> Shop: Set Payment Status to "captured"
    PAYONE --> Shop: 200 TSOK
    Shop --> Client: 302 done.php
    deactivate Shop
    deactivate PAYONE
  else [No 3-D Secure]
    Shop --> PAYONE: 200 status=APPROVED
    activate PAYONE
    Shop --> Shop: Set Payment Status to "pending"
    PAYONE --> Shop: 200 TSOK
    Shop --> Client: 302 done.php
    deactivate Shop
    deactivate PAYONE
  end
  Client -> Shop: GET done.php
  activate Shop
  Shop --> Client: 200 Thanks
  deactivate Shop
  deactivate Shop
else
  some time later
  Shop --> PAYONE: POST notify.php txaction=appointed transaction_status=completed
  activate PAYONE
  Shop --> Shop: Set Payment Status to "captured"
  PAYONE --> Shop: 200 TSOK
  deactivate Shop
  deactivate PAYONE
  some time later
  Shop --> PAYONE: POST notify.php txaction=paid
  activate PAYONE
  Shop --> Shop: 200 TSOK
  deactivate Shop
  deactivate PAYONE
end

@enduml
